reviews.review_description: Game is mindless fun, worth a buy at its price point. Graphics were better than i expected. In the off chance of an update (which would likley make the game more visible as its buried in the store) the red menu button was broken for me and i would like to see better ammo tracking. I tried to stack up ammo and then blast the targets but it seems to glitch out after i stack a few rounds. Also the ability to play just wack a mole or target shooting would be great. Maybe add a tiny bit haptic feedback for the bb gun.
What a cool looking game.  Super fun and unique.  I love trying to play wack a mole while aiming at the same time.
